# Kanban Board Template

A visual project management board for organizing work into columns. Track tasks as they move from "To Do" through "In Progress" to "Done."

## What's included

- **Board view** — Visual columns showing task status
- **Task cards** — Cards with title, description, assignee, and priority
- **Status columns** — Default columns: To Do, In Progress, Review, Done
- **Task details** — Click any card to see and edit its full details
- **Quick add** — Add new tasks directly to any column

## Data model

**Task**
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Title | Text | Task name |
| Description | Text | Task details |
| Status | Selection | To Do, In Progress, Review, Done |
| Priority | Selection | Low, Medium, High, Urgent |
| Assignee | Text | Who is responsible |
| Due date | Date | Deadline |

## Getting started

1. Go to **Templates** and select **Kanban Board**.
2. Click **Use Template** to create your project.
3. Add some tasks and move them between columns.
4. Customize the board to match your workflow.

## Customization ideas

> "Add custom columns for my workflow: Backlog, Design, Development, Testing, and Deployed."

> "Add color-coded labels for different project categories."

> "Add a list view option alongside the board view so I can switch between them."

> "Add due date indicators — show a red badge if a task is overdue."

> "Add swim lanes so I can group tasks by project or team."

## Who this is for

- Project managers tracking team progress
- Development teams using agile workflows
- Marketing teams managing campaigns
- Anyone who likes visual task organization
